message:
feat(dashboard): add log pause/resume controls

- Add pendingLines array to buffer log lines while paused
- Show play icon when paused, pause icon when running
- Display pending line count when paused: 'Resume (5)'
- Yellow styling when paused (bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700)
- Merge pending lines into logs when resumed with auto-scroll
- Clear button now also clears pending lines
- Use unique ID for log line keys instead of array index
